MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff John Truong is present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants Sandra Luiz and Danilo Jorge is present.
Attorney Conor Granahan representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Mark Schreiber, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of APR-09-2012 is vacated.
